en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 18

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 18
Top Question of the Week
When does the $MONA token snapshot voting on Bancor begin?
Given the overwhelming favor of the first DIGITALAX x BANCOR governance proposal to whitelist $MONA…. 99.44% in favor!! …We’ve been invited to do it again and make this happen!!

On Sunday August 8th 5am PST / 12pm UTC $MONA will go to snapshot vote. We need to make sure that we all actively acknowledge the privilege and exercise the rights of governance in this closely allied DAO.
This is a super exciting opportunity for $MONA that every community member can have a hand in making happen!

In order to participate in the vote you must hold vBNT and have it staked on the Bancor VOTE page prior to the $MONA governance proposal going live on snapshot. For a step by step on how to get vBNT and stake it please see here.
Most Common Repeat Questions
What’s upcoming on the DIGITALAX calendar?
It’s the first day of August and we all know what that means…. only 3 weeks until Web3 Fashion Week! 😍🤩🥰😘🥳

W3FW is hosted by DIGITALAX and the Global Designer Network. This is the very first comprehensive Web3 Fashion Week with full web3 technical functionality sewn into the fabric of the entire event, from DeFi, to NFTs, to DAO governance.
We have over 50 speakers across multiple panel discussions + keynotes, amazing NFT auction and other sale events dropping throughout the week.

A hugely significant part of this is that we have partnered with over 15 leading DeFi protocols who will each be running 101 workshops throughout the week, targeted on giving a full breakdown to designers and creators who are bridging into Web3, NFTs, DeFi. The DeFi protocols have never been invited to be able to speak directly to these audiences in this way. It’s something that’s been missing from this space immensely.
Top Controversies in the Industry

There is a reason that DIGITALAX has avoided taking VC money. The revolutionary aspect of blockchain is its peer to peer nature, allowing for all kinds of previously required barriers to come down. And, it’s really important that this feature is maintained at the highest fidelity. We don’t want to repeat the pitfalls of the past.
Silly Fails and Trolling
Most of us have seen Fortune’s Top 50 NFT Influencers list.. The Nifty 50. Let’s just say that it was an interesting mix.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!
Join our Community!

A hugely significant part من this is that we have partnered مع over 15 leading DeFi protocols who will each be running 101 workshops throughout ال اسبوع, targeted على giving a full breakdown الى designers و creators who are bridging into Web3, NFTs, DeFi. ال DeFi protocols have never been invited الى be able الى speak directly الى these audiences في this way. It’s something that’s been missing من this space immensely.
Top Controversies في ال Industry

There is a reason that DIGITALAX has avoided taking VC money. ال revolutionary aspect من blockchain is its peer الى peer nature, allowing لـ all kinds من previously required barriers الى come down. و, it’s really important that this feature is maintained at ال highest fidelity. We don’t want الى repeat ال pitfalls من ال past.
Silly Fails و Trolling
Most من us have seen Fortune’s Top 50 NFT Influencers list.. ال Nifty 50. Let’s just say that it was an interesting mix.
